cmd:
cd /app && sed -i 's/return category\.hashCode();/return sku.hashCode();/' src/Product.java
# Also update the comment
sed -i 's/Groups products by their category for cache-friendly bucket placement\./Uses SKU so that each product hashes to a distinct bucket./' src/Product.java
grep -n "hashCode\|sku\|category" src/Product.java | head -15
